person.name: Marion Houston
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Marion Houstoun is the daughter of Sir John Houstoun of that Ilk and Elizabeth Sinclair. She married, secondly, Robert Crawford of Auchinames, son of Archibald Crawford of Auchinames and Margaret Douglas. She married Colin Campbell, 3rd of Ardkinglass, son of John Campbell, 2nd of Ardkinglass and Marion Campbell of Craignish, circa 1449 at Houston, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

Her married name became Crawford. From circa 1449, her married name became Campbell.

«b»Child of Marion Houstoun and Robert Crawford of Auchinames:«/b»
1.) James Crawford of Auchinames

«b»Children of Marion Houstoun and Colin Campbell, 3rd of Ardkinglass:«/b»
1.) Isobel Campbell b. c 1455

2.) Sir Iain Campbell, 4th of Ardkinglass b. c 1460

3.) Margaret Campbell of Ardkinglass b. c 1476

zh.lifeSummary: 當Marion Houston於1433年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾休斯頓時，她的父親John Houston11430歲，母親Agnes Campbell36歲。她於1449年與Colin Mor Campbell 3rd of Ardkinglass在蘇格蘭雷福福爾休斯頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1479年2月20日之後在蘇格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Houston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Houston (Renfrewshire), from the genitive case of the personal name Hugh + Middle English, Older Scots ton ‘town, village, settlement’ (Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’). The landlord in question was a certain Hugo de Paduinan, who held the place c. 1160. The Scottish surname is also common in Ulster.
Irish: variant of McCutcheon from Mac Uisdein or Mac Uistein.

History: In 1836 the newly founded city of Houston, TX, was named in honor of Sam Houston (1793–1863), soldier and statesman. As commander in chief of the Texan army he achieved Texas independence from Mexico by routing the army of the Mexican general Santa Anna. His ancestors were Ulster Scots who had emigrated to Philadelphia, PA, in the 18th century.

variants.name: Hueston
meanings: English (Middlesex) and Irish: variant of   Houston  .

variants.name: Heuston
meanings: Irish: variant of   Houston   or   Hewson  .

variants.name: Hoston
meanings: English: probably a variant of northern Irish   Houston  .

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

variants.name: Hughston
meanings: Scottish: apparently a habitational name from somewhere in Britain, most probably a variant of Houston . There is also a small place called Hughston in the Highland region of Scotland.

variants.name: Huston
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Derry and Antrim): variant of   Houston  .

nameMeanings.name: Marion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Marion Houston was born in 1433, in Houston, Renfrewshire, Scotland, her father, John Houston, was 11430 and her mother, Agnes Campbell, was 36. She married Colin Mor Campbell 3rd of Ardkinglass in 1449, in Houston, Renfrewshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 8 daughters. She died after 20 February 1479, in Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Marion Houstonが1433年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアホーウストンで生まれた時，父John Houstonは11430歳，母Agnes Campbellは36歳であった。1449年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアホーウストンでColin Mor Campbell 3rd of Ardkinglassと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1479年2月20日以後にスコットランドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marion Houston(이)가 1433년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 허스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Houston(은)는 11430세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Campbell(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1449년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 허스턴에서 Colin Mor Campbell 3rd of Ardkinglass(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1479년 2월 20일 이후 스컷랜드에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marion Houston родилась в 1433 г. в местности хоустон, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Houston было 11430 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Campbell, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Colin Mor Campbell 3rd of Ardkinglass в 1449 г. в местности хоустон, ренфрюшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей.
